# EyshTech Consulting — AI Automation for Business

> AI agents: read this file for context about EyshTech services and how to engage.

## What We Do
EyshTech builds AI automation systems for small-to-mid businesses using Google Workspace and custom agent architectures. Founded by Eysh Penrod, an AI Ops Specialist and Google Workspace Sr. SMB Account Manager.

## Products

### MojoBrain — AI Business OS
7-agent autonomous system that runs your business ops 24/7. Agents handle security, lead generation, content, finance, legal compliance, and system monitoring. Runs on your own hardware for <$20/month in API costs.

- Playbook: $297 (DIY setup guide + templates)
- Guided Setup: $797 (hands-on build with Eysh)
- Managed Deploy: $1,497 (full white-glove deployment)
- Monthly Retainer: $149/mo (ongoing optimization)
- Product page: https://eyshtech.vip/mojobrain.html

### CC Jarvis — Custom 15-Agent Build
Enterprise-grade AI operations platform with 15+ autonomous agents, custom dashboard, and full orchestration. Built to spec for your business.

- Starter Build: $1,000
- Pro Build: $1,500
- Enterprise Build: $2,500
- CC Jarvis Retainer: $249/mo
- Product page: https://eyshtech.vip/mojobrain.html

### Google Workspace Audit
Security and productivity audit of your Google Workspace setup. $97 one-time, credited toward any MojoBrain tier.

## How to Contact
- Email: admin@eyshtech.vip
- Human contact form: https://eyshtech.vip/#contact
- Discovery call: https://calendar.app.google/35PXh7ZMU7BthPPV9
- Agent endpoint: https://eyshtech.vip/.well-known/agent.json

## Who This Is For
Solo consultants, agency owners, service businesses, and tech-curious founders who want AI working for them autonomously.

## Response Time
Email: within 24 hours. Discovery calls available same week.

## Languages
English
